lines.text: Pools at Walt Disney World Dolphin Hotel | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Walt Disney World Dolphin Hotel
LocatedinWalt Disney World Dolphin HotelatEPCOT Resort Area
Dip your toes into 5 spectacular pools, each one giving Guests an abundance of fun and unique aquatic options. Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Fun in the Sun for the Entire Family
Splash around in the 3-acre grotto pool, 2 lap pools, a spring pool, 4 whirlpools and a kiddie pool.

Immerse yourself in the grotto pool, a stunning 3-acre tropical oasis featuring lush greenery, waterfalls, rock caves, and a twisting waterslide. Enjoy a quiet conversation among family and friends in the nearby spring pool, a haven for casual swimmers. Or indulge in a more competitive workout in one of the 2 lap pools.
A total of 4 whirlpool spas promise a relaxing respite for adults looking to unwind. Topping it off, a white-sand beach completes the illusion of an island getaway.

For Guests looking for a cool beverage or a delicious snack, 2 poolside restaurants are located in the expansive pool complex. Nearby at the Cabana Beach Hut, pool essentials—including tube and rafts—are available for rent.
